title: Dr. Prince Endorses Aahbibi to Foster Digital Literacy and Tech-Driven Opportunities for Enugu Youths - FinancialEDGE
description: International tech leaders from Dubai, Ghana, Kenya, and Senegal declare unified support as Learning247 launches the Creators Summit 2025 the definitive launchpad for Africa’s next generation of digital creators and tech professionals. Dr. Prince, renowned education advocate and the current Commissioner for Innovation, Science, and Technology to the Enugu State Government, has issued a powerful
html: International tech leaders from Dubai, Ghana, Kenya, and Senegal declare unified support as Learning247 launches the Creators Summit 2025  the definitive launchpad for Africa’s next generation of digital creators and tech professionals.
